topic: My old disconnected phone, dead in a drawer, rings every night at the same minute.
title: My Dead Phone Rings Every Night At The Same Minute | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My old phone has no battery, yet it rings every single night.
scenes.image_prompt: an old cracked smartphone lying dark in a cluttered drawer, faint glow on its screen, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep it in a drawer in my bedroom, switched off for years.
scenes.image_prompt: an open bedside drawer holding tangled cables and a dead phone, dim lamp light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It always rings at twelve seventeen exactly.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone screen lit in darkness showing a call clock, fog, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first night I thought I had imagined the sound.
scenes.image_prompt: a person's silhouette sitting up in a dark bed, faint glow from a drawer, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next night it rang again. Same minute.
scenes.image_prompt: a glowing phone face-up in a drawer in a black room, harsh contrast, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I opened it. No battery inside, just an empty slot.
scenes.image_prompt: hands holding an opened phone case with a missing battery compartment, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove it to the lake and threw it in.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark lake shore at night, ripples spreading, a faint glow sinking under the water, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That night, twelve seventeen, the drawer rang again.
scenes.image_prompt: the same bedside drawer glowing from within, empty room, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I finally answered. Static, then breathing, then my own voice.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand lifting a glowing phone to a silhouetted ear in the dark, harsh screen light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My voice said I would be there soon. It used my name.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone screen glowing in a dark room with an active call timer, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not slept past midnight since.
scenes.image_prompt: a person sitting awake on the edge of a bed at night, faint window light, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Twelve seventeen was the minute I was born.
scenes.image_prompt: an old hospital wristband resting beside a dead phone on a nightstand, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
